**Category:** [Which section does this belong in?]

### Why is this skill awesome?

### Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contribution guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The skill is publicly available.
- [ ] The skill has a `SKILL.md` file following the Agent Skills specification.
- [ ] The skill has been tested with Claude Code.
- [ ] The entry follows the format: `- [skill-name](link) - Description ending with a period.`
- [ ] The entry is added in the correct category in alphabetical order.
- [ ] The description is concise (one sentence, under 150 characters).
- [ ] I have checked spelling and grammar.
